# F1 2026 Content Calendar

**Three articles per race weekend. All auto-generated by Claude, queued for your review.**

| Tag | Day | When | Format |
|---|---|---|---|
| F1 Fantasy | Wednesday | 2 days before FP1 | Race Week Preview |
| F1 | Friday | After FP1 & FP2 | Friday Debrief |
| F1 Fantasy | Monday | Day after race | Race Rewind |

## Article Formats at a Glance

### Format 1: Race Rewind (Monday | F1 Fantasy | 600–800 words)
1. The Result in One Line
2. What It Means For Your Team
3. Price Watch (bullet points — risers/fallers)
4. The Takeaway

### Format 2: Race Week Preview (Wednesday | F1 Fantasy | 600–800 words)
1. The Setup
2. The Circuit
3. The Weather
4. The Weekly Watchlist — Buy · Hold · Sell
5. The Chips

### Format 3: Friday Debrief (Friday | F1 | 600–800 words)
1. The Headline
2. FP1 Snapshot
3. FP2 Snapshot
4. Fantasy Impact
5. Tomorrow's Key Question
